description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the daewok/lisp-devel Docker image and a global before_script that runs apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y git-core, and make install. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a build job that runs make build, stores the replic file as an artifact, and only runs for tag pipelines. In the test stage add a test job that runs make test, is allowed to fail, and also only runs for tag pipelines.
